## Summary

What this change does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] New provider adapter (beyond Periskope)
- [ ] Channel stub filled in (Discord / email)
- [ ] Transcription backend
- [ ] Plugin enhancement (pull / push / grab / transcribe)
- [ ] Learning content or docs
- [ ] Bug fix

## Testing notes

How you ran this against a real chat. Which provider, which channel.

## Checklist

- [ ] No real phone numbers, group ids, or API keys committed (resolution stays in the user-local registry).
- [ ] The `/push` preview-and-confirm gate and credential scan are intact.
- [ ] `/transcribe` has no cloud fallback.
- [ ] Message bodies stay out of audit logs.

## References

Related issues or discussion.
